case_title: CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ASSOCIATES VS PATEL BIPIN D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL BIPIN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL BIPIN D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL BIPIN D. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL BIPIN D.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22247, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ASSOCIATES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL BIPIN D. PLTF. TO PAY DEF. $38.00.JUDG.ENTERED ON 1/21/93 IN SUP.CT.SCA 22247.SEE ATTACHED FOR REASONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
